lastStrategyDecision.reason: Scanned evidence remains low-conviction for automated intraday entries: marketCondition is neutral, averageRelativeVolume ~1.0 provides no participation edge, averageGapPercent is negative (-0.99%) which reduces clean momentum continuation odds, averageLiquidityScore ~46.7 implies moderate slippage/stop uncertainty, and averageCatalystScore ~20.75 is weak (lower follow-through probability). Although uptrendShare ~0.55 and all candidates are fresh, the overall quality does not justify allocating risk today. Maintain conservative long-only pullback-to-VWAP framework with bracket exits, but observe only (rank/monitor) until RVOL, liquidity, and catalyst strength improve. Paper active exploration is enabled: live market data is fresh and the setup quality is acceptable, so the desk may take small paper trades while risk gates remain active.
